text.title: Product Trio Rituals Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to operate the weekly ritual.

step.name: prep
step.action: Build agenda; assign owner + desired outcome + 10-min timebox per item.

step.name: run
step.action: Run session with strict timebox; facilitator parks overruns.

step.name: log
step.action: Write each decision with rationale + follow-up owner; commit artefact.
step.decision-gate: Reject decisions missing rationale or follow-up owner.

step.name: review
step.action: Confirm outcomes against prior decisions; surface stale decisions in next session.

step.name: score
step.action: Update scorecard: decisions taken, carryover, discovery items closed.
